/CAL:RE-SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(A), A STRAIGHT SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 TO 2 YEARS THE MIDDLE TERM/STATES/X:TOTAL 2 YEARS/X:THIS SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED CONSECUTIVELY TO SENTENCE IN#15011415/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(A), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED ASFOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ 2Y /CTS:240/4019HALF/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:300/COLLECT/PAR/WEAP/RESTV/X:SENTENCE MAYBE BE MODIFIED IF DEFENDANT IS ACCEPTED INTO A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL:COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AMEND SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 08-30-2016/CTORD:THATTHE SENTENCE PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(B)(5) IMPOSED ON  08-30-2016 IS SET ASIDE & VACATED/X:ON 08-30-2016, THE DEFENDANT WAS DEEMED ACCEPTED TO SALVATION ARMY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM BUT WAS SUBSEQUENTLY REJECTED BECAUSE OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING ISSUES,/X:ON 09-15-2016, THE SF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT AND THE COURT DISCOVERED THATTHE DEFENDANT IS STILL IN JAIL BUT HAD NOT BEEN TRANSPORTED ANYWHERE AND HAD ENOUGH CTS TO BE RELEASED,/X:ON 09-16-2016, THESE CASES WERE HEARD IN DEPT, 23 BUT THE CLERK WAS UNABLE TO CONTACT COUNSEL OF RECORD ATTY, ZISHOLZ THRU TELEPHONE, TEXT MESSAGE,NOR EMAIL,/BAIL:90,000/CONTD:RE-SENTENCING ON 09-19-16/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1170(H)/ARG&SUB/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE PRE-SENTENCE REPORT  TO ADD A MITIGATING FACTOR & TO REMOVE AGGRAVATING FACTOR IS GRANTED, AS STATED ONTHE RECORD/CTORD:THAT THE SENTENCES IN COURT 150011415 & 16001469 ARE TO RUN CONCURRENTLY://AJW/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO TWO (2) YEARS STATE PRISON,MIDDLE TERM, TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/X:ONE (1) YEAR IN COUNTY JAIL; WITH221 DAYS CTS; PC 4019 ELIGIBLE; AND/X:ONE (1) YEAR IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT SALVATION ARMY ADULT REHABILITATION CENTER THRU APD,/CTORD:THAT FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM WILL RESULT IN COUNTY JAIL TIME& MANDATORY SUPERVISION FOR THE REMAINDER OF THE SENTENCE/CH1:CJ 1 Y/CTS:221/4019HALF/X:TOTAL TWO YEARS STATE PRISON,/X:MIDDLE TERM/STATES/DNACOMP/WS/RESTV/VF4:300/COA:40/ICNA/BKFEE/PSR/COLLECT/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT UPON RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCEDPURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1170(H),/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 08-30-16/ARBUCKLE/REMA/VD: 08-23-16,DEPT 22 HEARING/CONTD:  08-30-16, SENTENCING/DOP/
